soleil.title: Soleil
soleil.description: A star that provides light and heat to Earth.

sable.title: Sable
sable.description: Granular material composed of finely divided rock and mineral particles.
sable.citation: Le sable est le lit du désert.

memoire.title: Mémoire
memoire.description: The faculty by which the mind stores and remembers information.
memoire.citation: La mémoire est la gardienne du passé.
